<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（99.7%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（99.7%）</li>

<li>chondroid hamartoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>cystic neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>thyroglossal duct cyst（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
